title: Routines
subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

composer.title: New routine
composer.subtitle: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
composer.afterCreation: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.

advanced.title: Advanced delivery settings
advanced.subtitle: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.

policies.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
policies.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
policies.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
policies.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
policies.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

descriptions.coalesce_if_active: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
descriptions.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
descriptions.skip_if_active: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.
descriptions.skip_missed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
descriptions.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
descriptions.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
descriptions.hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.

detail.webhookSecretNotice: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.

toasts.createdBody: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
toasts.failedToSaveBody: Paperclip could not save the routine.
toasts.failedToUpdateBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toasts.failedToAddTriggerBody: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
toasts.failedToUpdateTriggerBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
toasts.failedToDeleteTriggerBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
toasts.failedToRotateWebhookBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
toasts.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
